headline: Is Synopsys, Inc. (SNPS) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is SNPS a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Synopsys, Inc. on MMMT Wealth’s Substack by Oliver | MMMT Wealth. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on SNPS. Synopsys, Inc.’s share was trading at $438.45 as of April 15th. SNPS’s trailing and forward P/E were 64.28 and 28.99 respectively […]

headline: Sensient Technologies, Chemed, AMD, Arm And Other Big Stocks Moving Higher On Friday
summary: U.S. stocks mixed with Dow down 150 pts. Sensient Technologies Corp (NYSE:SXT) shares up 15.8% after beating earnings estimates. Other big gainers include Maxlinear Inc (NASDAQ:MXL), Intel Corp (NASDAQ:INTC), and AppFolio Inc (NASDAQ:APPF).
